title: Dry Rubbed Kenyan Lamb Kebabs
description: A cultured and festive Kenyan dish featuring dried mint and robata-grilled lamb, perfect for special occasions. This sugar-free-friendly recipe is sure to impress.
instructions: Preheat the robata grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine lamb cubes, dried mint, ground cumin, smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Mix well to coat the lamb evenly with the dry rub.
Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the lamb kebabs for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until they reach an internal temperature of 145 degrees Fahrenheit.
Brush the kebabs with lemon juice during the last minute of grilling.
Remove the kebabs from the grill and let them rest for 5 minutes before serving.
